sun.name: Sun
sun.description: Our star at the center of the Solar System.

planets.name: Mercury
planets.description: The smallest and innermost planet of the Solar System.

planets.name: Venus
planets.description: Second planet from the Sun and the brightest natural object in the night sky after the Moon.

planets.name: Earth
planets.description: Our home planet, the only known world to harbor life.

planets.name: Mars
planets.description: The red planet, known for its iron-oxide surface.

planets.name: Jupiter
planets.description: The largest planet in the Solar System, a gas giant with many moons.

planets.name: Saturn
planets.description: Gas giant famous for its prominent ring system.

planets.name: Uranus
planets.description: An ice giant with a tilted rotation axis.

planets.name: Neptune
planets.description: The most distant known major planet, an ice giant with strong winds.
